Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:9000/store/cms-pages/v2" -H "x-publishable-api-key: pk_8cff45410a9b73dc0eb32f4f0465b54b3bf8d8b7e7973912b7a1734d14800276" | node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('layout:', !!j.layout\); console.log\('gjsHtml present:', 'gjsHtml' in \(j.page?.content||{}\)\); console.log\('gjsHtml value:', JSON.stringify\(j.page?.content?.gjsHtml\)?.substring\(0,80\)\)")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:9000/store/cms-pages/v2" -H "x-publishable-api-key: pk_8cff45410a9b73dc0eb32f4f0465b54b3bf8d8b7e7973912b7a1734d14800276" | node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('layout:', j.layout !== null\); console.log\('gjsHtml present:', Object.hasOwn\(j.page.content, 'gjsHtml'\)\); console.log\('gjsHtml:', String\(j.page.content.gjsHtml\).substring\(0,80\)\)")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:9000/store/cms-pages/v2" -H "x-publishable-api-key: pk_8cff45410a9b73dc0eb32f4f0465b54b3bf8d8b7e7973912b7a1734d14800276" | node -e "
var d = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0, 'utf8'\)
var j = JSON.parse\(d\)
console.log\('has layout:', j.layout != null\)
console.log\('gjsHtml key exists:', 'gjsHtml' in j.page.content\)
console.log\('gjsHtml value \(truncated\):', String\(j.page.content.gjsHtml\).substring\(0, 60\)\)
console.log\('layout html has placeholder:', j.layout && j.layout.html.includes\('CMS_CONTENT_PLACEHOLDER'\)\)
")

Bash(mkdir -p /c/tmp && curl -s "http://localhost:9000/store/cms-pages/v2" -H "x-publishable-api-key: pk_8cff45410a9b73dc0eb32f4f0465b54b3bf8d8b7e7973912b7a1734d14800276" > /c/tmp/cms-response.json && node -e "var j = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('C:/tmp/cms-response.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('layout:', j.layout ? 'yes' : 'no'\); console.log\('gjsHtml type:', typeof j.page.content.gjsHtml\); console.log\('placeholder in layout:', j.layout ? String\(j.layout.html.indexOf\('CMS_CONTENT'\)\) : 'n/a'\)")
